scripts.build:platform: cross-env VITE_APP_TITLE="General Platform Center" VITE_APP_NAMESPACE=general-web-general-platform VITE_APP_STORE_SECURE_KEY=general-admin-web-general-platform-key VITE_APP_DEFAULT_HOME_PATH=/platform/workspace VITE_GLOB_APP_CODES=platform pnpm vite build --mode production
scripts.build:platform:desktop: cross-env VITE_APP_TITLE="General Platform Center" VITE_APP_NAMESPACE=general-web-general-platform VITE_APP_STORE_SECURE_KEY=general-admin-web-general-platform-key VITE_APP_DEFAULT_HOME_PATH=/platform/workspace VITE_GLOB_APP_CODES=platform pnpm vite build --mode desktop
scripts.dev:platform: cross-env VITE_APP_TITLE="General Platform Center" VITE_APP_NAMESPACE=general-web-general-platform VITE_APP_STORE_SECURE_KEY=general-admin-web-general-platform-key VITE_APP_DEFAULT_HOME_PATH=/platform/workspace VITE_GLOB_APP_CODES=platform VITE_PORT=5678 pnpm vite --mode development
